---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages, console output, or network errors.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11.0] (if running locally)
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125]
- Deployment: [local dev / Docker / other]

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (recent changes, workarounds you've tried, etc.).
